headline: Italy's antitrust regulator probes Apple over cloud services under Digital Market rules
summary: Italy's competition regulator said on Tuesday it had ‌opened an investigation into Apple over ‌compliance with interoperability obligations, under the European Digital ​Markets Act.  Under the rules, Apple must ensure that third-party providers of consumer cloud services can inter-operate effectively and free of ‌charge with hardware ⁠and software components controlled through the group's iOS and iPadOS ⁠operating systems, and have equal access as Apple's iCloud service.

content.title: Italy's antitrust regulator probes Apple over cloud services under Digital Market rules
content.summary: Italy's competition regulator said on Tuesday it had ‌opened an investigation into Apple over ‌compliance with interoperability obligations, under the European Digital ​Markets Act.  Under the rules, Apple must ensure that third-party providers of consumer cloud services can inter-operate effectively and free of ‌charge with hardware ⁠and software components controlled through the group's iOS and iPadOS ⁠operating systems, and have equal access as Apple's iCloud service.

headline: SpaceX Options Start Trading Today. It’s Getting Wild.
summary: Options on  SpaceX  stock are scheduled to begin trading when the stock market opens on Tuesday.  The options trading is likely to boost the stock, though it could create some intraday price swings.  Demand for the stock is so high that the options are likely to be among the most actively traded in the entire options market, joining a pedigreed club that includes  Apple Amazon Nvidia Meta  and others in an exclusive club.

content.title: SpaceX Options Start Trading Today. It’s Getting Wild.
content.summary: Options on  SpaceX  stock are scheduled to begin trading when the stock market opens on Tuesday.  The options trading is likely to boost the stock, though it could create some intraday price swings.  Demand for the stock is so high that the options are likely to be among the most actively traded in the entire options market, joining a pedigreed club that includes  Apple Amazon Nvidia Meta  and others in an exclusive club.

headline: Tata says India pollution board drops scrutiny of Apple iPhone parts plant
summary: Apple's Indian supplier Tata Electronics on Tuesday said a state pollution control board has dropped its scrutiny ‌of the company's iPhone components plant after it addressed concerns about contamination.  The southern Tamil ‌Nadu state's pollution control authority had warned Tata of a forced shutdown unless it explained why government inspections found that ​wastewater discharge had contaminated open wells in adjacent agricultural lands, Reuters reported on Saturday.  On Tuesday, Tata told Reuters in a statement that the Tamil Nadu Pollution Control Board had confirmed that the company "has satisfactorily addressed all queries mentioned" in the warning notice and "dropped any further course of action on this ‌issue".

content.title: Tata says India pollution board drops scrutiny of Apple iPhone parts plant
content.summary: Apple's Indian supplier Tata Electronics on Tuesday said a state pollution control board has dropped its scrutiny ‌of the company's iPhone components plant after it addressed concerns about contamination.  The southern Tamil ‌Nadu state's pollution control authority had warned Tata of a forced shutdown unless it explained why government inspections found that ​wastewater discharge had contaminated open wells in adjacent agricultural lands, Reuters reported on Saturday.  On Tuesday, Tata told Reuters in a statement that the Tamil Nadu Pollution Control Board had confirmed that the company "has satisfactorily addressed all queries mentioned" in the warning notice and "dropped any further course of action on this ‌issue".

thumbnail.caption: The entrance to the Tata Electronics components factory for Apple's iPhone in southern India

headline: Apple (AAPL) Faces Italy DMA Probe Over Cloud Interoperability
summary: Italy’s competition authority has opened a Digital Markets Act probe into Apple’s cloud service interoperability on iOS and iPadOS. Regulators are examining whether Apple limits third party consumer cloud providers from using certain system features, potentially favoring iCloud. This is the first investigation launched by a national authority under the EU’s Digital Markets Act and focuses on how Apple’s ecosystem interacts with external services. Apple (NasdaqGS:AAPL) faces this new...

content.title: Apple (AAPL) Faces Italy DMA Probe Over Cloud Interoperability
content.summary: Italy’s competition authority has opened a Digital Markets Act probe into Apple’s cloud service interoperability on iOS and iPadOS. headline: VoIP-Pal.com Inc. Engages Veteran Consumer Class Action and Complex Litigation Attorney C. Glen Ged as Strategic Legal Consultant
summary: WACO, Texas, June 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- VoIP-Pal.com Inc. ("VoIP-Pal") (OTCID: VPLM) today announced the engagement of C. Glen Ged, founder of Ged Lawyers, LLP, as Strategic Legal Consultant to the Company. headline: What Trump's clamp down on Anthropic is signaling to rest of the world
summary: The Trump administration pushes harder on Anthropic (ANTH.PVT) after the private AI developer pulled its Claude Mythos and Fable 5 models from the market in response to demands to cut AI product access to foreign governments. Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley joins the Market Domination team in reporting on the day's biggest tech headlines.

headline: SpaceX extends historic rally, rockets to No. 4 by market value
summary: Yahoo Finance Markets & Data Editor Jared Blikre tracks SpaceX's (SPCX) historic rise following its IPO debut on Friday. The aerospace giant has been on a meteoric run, jumping to become the fourth-largest company in the world by market capitalization as investors pile into one of the market's most closely watched new listings.

headline: Wall Street can’t stop talking about ‘MANGOS’ stocks as the ‘Magnificent Seven’ becomes passé
